mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibration_data ( sensor_id, vibration_value, collect_time, create_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{sensorId}, #{vibrationValue}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, vibration_value AS vibrationValue, collect_time AS collectTime FROM vibration_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
